baselines.name: fixed_chunk_only
baselines.purpose: Legacy fixed chunking with default vector retrieval.

baselines.name: block_aware_chunk_only
baselines.purpose: Isolates the effect of block-aware chunking under the default retrieval mode.

baselines.name: block_aware_hybrid_text
baselines.purpose: Tests lexical recall for exact API paths, config keys, file paths, and technical tokens.

baselines.name: block_aware_graph_vector_mix
baselines.purpose: Tests lightweight graph candidate merge plus vector candidates.

baselines.name: block_aware_auto
baselines.purpose: Tests the M16 rule-based query router over the same block-aware KB.
